title: Sync Waypoint
description: share your waypoints in server to find easily
body:
# Sync Waypoint
Wait,This is a server mod.

Share your Waypoints form Xaero's Map or JourneyMap in server.
Then Sync Waypoint can record them.
Everyone can find them so easily in server.

## commands
- /sync-waypoint
    - add <string>
    - remove <waypoint uid>
    - edit <waypoint uid>
    - search <key words>
    - list
    - help

By 2020-2023 UnknownBits Studio
